ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("=== Green U-shapes area (rows 19-23, cols 36-48) ===")

for n in nodes:

        if b and 18 <= b[0][0] <= 24:
            print(f"  N: id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
